plugins.name: dev-workflow
plugins.description: Branch/PR lifecycle (premerge, restructure-commits, merge), docs sync, and review agents (code reviewer, commit-message writer, documentation gap-finder).

plugins.name: second-brain
plugins.description: Personal memory for Claude Code: a SessionEnd hook captures every session, then skills file it into a topical wiki + temporal journal (librarian + journal extractor/grouper). Plain Markdown — view in any editor.
